financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well because it gained many new customers in its broadband and mobile services.
They managed their spending wisely, which improved their financial health and led to a better credit rating.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well by leaving less profitable areas and managing its spending carefully.
They have reduced their debt significantly, showing they are financially strong and responsible.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in taking care of the environment, but there's room for improvement.
They are also good at treating people fairly and managing their business responsibly.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their strong financial health and future plans.
They consistently showed optimism, even when asked tough questions about their strategies.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company shared some plans but didn't give clear numbers or details about future spending.
Some answers were helpful, but many were too general and not backed by enough data.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well because it's investing smartly in digital and broadband, which are growing fast.
Even though there are some challenges, the company's strong areas like mobile services are expected to keep doing well.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Airtel is doing well in mobile and broadband, which helps it grow and makes it a good buy.
The company is expanding its digital services and network, but some areas are growing slowly and debt could be a concern.
